headline: Cisco acquired Splunk in an all-cash transaction
rationale: Create a scaled security and observability platform
notes: Announcement discloses equity value, not enterprise value; valuation multiples remain N/M.
financials_metric_basis: Audited GAAP revenue; EBITDA not calculated because the transaction announcement disclosed equity value rather than EV
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and latest audited financials available at announcement

headline: Broadcom acquired VMware in a cash-and-stock transaction
advisors: Barclays, Morgan Stanley, Citi, Goldman Sachs, J.P. Morgan, BofA Securities
rationale: Scale Broadcom's infrastructure software business and expand enterprise software exposure
notes: EV equals USD 61bn equity consideration plus USD 8bn assumed net debt, as disclosed by Broadcom.
financials_metric_basis: GAAP EBITDA calculated as operating income plus depreciation and definite-lived intangible amortization
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and latest audited financials available at announcement

headline: Thoma Bravo acquired Anaplan in an all-cash transaction
rationale: Accelerate Anaplan's connected planning platform as a private company
notes: Announcement discloses transaction value, not enterprise value; valuation multiples remain N/M.
financials_metric_basis: Audited GAAP revenue; filed after announcement and transaction EV was not separately disclosed
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and audited financials; report became available after announcement

acquirer_or_investor: Vista Equity Partners and Evergreen Coast Capital
headline: Vista Equity Partners and Evergreen Coast Capital acquired Citrix Systems
rationale: Take Citrix private and combine it with TIBCO Software
notes: USD 16.5bn transaction value includes assumed debt; financial filing became public after announcement.
financials_metric_basis: Audited GAAP revenue; filed after announcement and therefore excluded from headline medians
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and audited financials; report became available after announcement

headline: Microsoft acquired Activision Blizzard in an all-cash transaction
advisors: Goldman Sachs, Allen & Company, Simpson Thacher, Skadden
rationale: Expand Microsoft Gaming across mobile, PC, console and cloud
notes: Transaction value is treated as EV because Microsoft's announcement describes USD 68.7bn inclusive of Activision Blizzard net cash.
financials_metric_basis: Audited GAAP revenue and operating income; EBITDA intentionally not calculated without separately sourced D&A
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and latest audited financials available at announcement

headline: Salesforce acquired Slack Technologies in a cash-and-stock transaction
rationale: Combine Salesforce Customer 360 with enterprise collaboration
notes: Salesforce disclosed enterprise value of approximately USD 27.7bn.
financials_metric_basis: Audited GAAP revenue; negative operating result, so EV/EBITDA is N/M
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and latest audited financials available at announcement

headline: AMD acquired Xilinx in an all-stock transaction
rationale: Create a scaled high-performance and adaptive computing company
notes: Announcement gives transaction value; enterprise value is not separately disclosed, so multiples remain N/M.
financials_metric_basis: Audited GAAP revenue; transaction EV was not separately disclosed
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and latest audited financials available at announcement

headline: Salesforce acquired Tableau Software in an all-stock transaction
rationale: Combine CRM and analytics platforms to accelerate digital transformation
notes: Salesforce disclosed enterprise value of USD 15.7bn net of cash.
financials_metric_basis: Audited GAAP revenue rounded to the nearest USD million; EBITDA not calculated without separately sourced D&A
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and latest audited financials available at announcement

headline: IBM acquired Red Hat in an all-cash transaction
rationale: Build a leading hybrid cloud platform using open-source technology
notes: IBM disclosed total enterprise value of approximately USD 34bn.
financials_metric_basis: Audited GAAP revenue and operating income; EBITDA not calculated without separately sourced D&A
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and latest audited financials available at announcement

headline: Microsoft acquired LinkedIn in an all-cash transaction
rationale: Combine the professional cloud with the professional network
notes: Microsoft disclosed USD 26.2bn inclusive of LinkedIn net cash.
financials_metric_basis: GAAP EBITDA proxy calculated as operating loss plus reported depreciation and amortization
multiple_notes: Calculated from disclosed EV and latest audited financials available at announcement
